ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packages" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Group name of the package */,
  "artifact_name" TEXT /* Artifact name of the package */,
  "package_version" TEXT /* Version of the package */,
  "version_control_system" TEXT /* Version control system used by the package */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the package repository */,
  "package_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the package */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "remote_licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each remote license */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package to which this license applies */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of the remote license */,
  "license_url" TEXT /* URL of the license */,
  "license_text" TEXT /* Full text of the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_remote_licenses_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "local_licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each local license */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package to which this license applies */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of the local license */,
  "license_file" TEXT /* Local license file */,
  "license_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the local license file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_local_licenses_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_lead FOREIGN KEY ("project_lead") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_packages" (
  "project_package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project-package relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was integrated into the project */,
  "removal_date" TEXT /* Date when the package was removed from the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_packages_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_packages_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, compliance officer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package that was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_history_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "license_compliance_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance check */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance check was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance check (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "issues_found" TEXT /* Description of any issues found during the check */,
  "check_performed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the compliance check */,
  "check_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_license_compliance_checks_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES packages ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_license_compliance_checks_check_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("check_performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "license_types" (
  "license_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license type */,
  "license_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the license type (e.g., MIT, GPL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license type */,
  "license_category" TEXT /* Category of the license type (e.g., permissive, copyleft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_type_id")
)
